title: chrysojasminum humile f. wallichianum
intro: Chrysojasminum humile f. wallichianum, also known as the Himalayan jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. Its health benefits include potential uses in treating digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
